zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton於1286年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓時，他的父親Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall25歲，母親Joan Hastang32歲。他於大約1307年與Margaret Houghton在英國斯塔福爾斯恩頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國斯塔福爾斯恩頓被列為1st lord of swynnerton。他去世於1338年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton于1286年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓时，他的父亲Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall25岁，母亲Joan Hastang32岁。他于大约1307年与Margaret Houghton在英国斯塔福爾斯恩頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国斯塔福爾斯恩頓被列为1st lord of swynnerton。他去世于1338年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Swynnerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Swinnerton
meanings: English: habitational name from Swynnerton in Staffordshire. The etymology of the placename is uncertain. It may derive from Old English swille ‘sloppy mess, swill’ + ford ‘ford’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Alternatively, the first element may be swīn ‘swine, hog’, swān ‘herdsman, peasant’, swan ‘swan’, or sumor ‘summer’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton was born in 1286, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall, was 25 and his mother, Joan Hastang, was 32. He married Margaret Houghton about 1307, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as 1st lord of swynnerton in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England. He died before 1338, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton est né en 1286, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Hastang, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Houghton environ 1307, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est 1st lord of swynnerton à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 1338, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton 1286 in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall 25 und seine Mutter Joan Hastang 32. Er hat um 1307 in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England Margaret Houghton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als 1st lord of swynnerton in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 1338 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton è nato il nel 1286 nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Joan Hastang, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Houghton circa 1307, nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come 1st lord of swynnerton nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England. Morì prima del 1338, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnertonが1286年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンで生まれた時，父Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewallは25歳，母Joan Hastangは32歳であった。約1307年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンでMargaret Houghtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンでの職業は1st lord of swynnertonと記録されている。彼は1338年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton(이)가 1286년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Hastang(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1307년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 Margaret Houghton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 1st lord of swynnerton이었다. 그는 1338년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton nasceu em 1286, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan Hastang, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Houghton aproximadamente 1307, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como 1st lord of swynnerton em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 1338, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton родился в 1286 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Hastang, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Houghton около 1307 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии 1st lord of swynnerton в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия. Он умер перед 1338 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton nació en 1286, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan Hastang, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margaret Houghton aproximadamente 1307, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era 1st lord of swynnerton en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 1338, en su pueblo.
